# Learnings Index

Index of project learnings and corrective actions.

## When To Add A Record

- Repeat incident or avoidable mistake.
- Decision reversal caused by missing context.
- Significant regression found during review or release.

## Record Template

- ID: LRN-###
- Title: short description
- Related items: backlog ID(s), ADR ID(s), or design section
- Action: prevention or process adjustment

## Records

- None yet.
